note: Live national TV per country code. Every channel verified ACTUALLY streaming at generation time — YouTube ids via yt-dlp (is_live + playable_in_embed), HLS playlists via curl (HTTP 200 + Access-Control-Allow-Origin + advancing live segments). kind: 'yt' = 24/7 YouTube live; 'hls' = broadcaster's own .m3u8 (for state TV YouTube removed, e.g. RT, or that never had an official channel there, e.g. KCTV). A channel that rots removes itself at runtime.

CN.name: CGTN
CN.about: China Global Television Network — the state international broadcaster, 24/7

CN.name: CCTV-4 中文国际
CN.about: China Central Television's international Chinese-language channel (Asia feed)

KP.name: KCTV — Korean Central Television
KP.about: The DPRK state broadcaster. Broadcasts roughly 15:00–22:30 Pyongyang time (test card off-hours).

RU.name: RT News
RU.about: Russia Today — the state international broadcaster. Removed from YouTube in 2022; this is RT's own stream.

DE.name: DW News
DE.about: Deutsche Welle — Germany's public international broadcaster
